title: townsendia grandiflora
intro: Townsendia grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered Townsend daisy, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Townsendia grandiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Townsendia grandiflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
